name: warpish-terminal
description: Local-only Chrome web terminal with a real macOS PTY, Warp-inspired UI.

scripts.check: npm run lint && node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/smoke.js && node --check scripts/browser-regressions.js && node --check scripts/ui-stability-agent.js && python3 -m py_compile scripts/pty-worker.py && zsh -n scripts/warpish-shell-integration.zsh && bash -n start.sh stop.sh && git diff --check
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run regression
